text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look! People are already uploading pics
from today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
choice_data_list: Well, you gave it your all!
Well, you gave it your all!
Let's make them even happier next time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
choice_data_list: Well, you gave it your all!
Well, you gave it your all!
Let's make them even happier next time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My most important person hasn't told me the
most important thing yet. Hint, hint.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. There it is. ♪ That's me! Cute Curren!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Next time, I'll run a race so wonderful that
you'll tell me before I even ask! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'll try even harder next time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
This is a period of growth for me, after all! Day by
day, I'll keep on getting cuter!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay! Now it's time to take a
"#CutenessDeclaration" pic for Umastagram. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll strike some awesome poses while you get to
work behind the camera!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll strike some awesome poses while you get to
work behind the camera!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Here I go... One, two, three...

Curren Chan uploads the picture with her
declaration, and the comments from people
cheering her on start pouring in.
